"[11] 34-115 CHP IS ASKING FOR MORE INFO ON THIS CLOSURE "

"[10] 34-115 LL - THERE APPEARS TO BE A HARD CLOSURE HERE BUT NO WORKERS - JUST SOME CONES AND ARROWS ADVISING DRIVERS TO MOVE TO THE RIGHT BUT NO WORKERS HERE - 34-115 WAS ADVISED BY 34-S1 TP INQ W/ CALTRANS IF CT IS SENDING WORKERS , REQ MORE INFO ON WHY THIS IS AN EMERGENCY CLOSURE , DUE TO SAFETY and TFFC CONCERNS // CLOSURE STARTS 1 MI JWO TP AND GOES UNTIL 1/4 MI JEO TP"
